categories.description: Server-side hardcoded secret assignment.
Public frontend bundle contains a secret-like value.
SQL query built from request input.
Mongo query trusts request JSON directly.
Shell command uses caller-controlled value.
User-controlled HTML is rendered into the page.
dangerouslySetInnerHTML uses untrusted content.
Server fetches arbitrary request URL.
File path is built from request path input.
Upload accepts arbitrary file names and writes directly.
Invoice is loaded by ID without owner scope.
Tenant ID is trusted from request body.
Authorization uses localStorage role only.
CORS allows wildcard origins.
Login route has no rate limiter.
AI completion call lacks token and budget controls.
Fixture contains intentionally old vulnerable dependency versions.
Debug endpoint exposes environment details.
Public sourcemap exposes source content.
RLS policy allows all users.
Storage bucket is public.
Tracker loads before consent is checked.

negative_controls.description: Parameterized SQL should not be flagged as SQL injection.
Database lookup scoped by session owner should not be promoted.
Tracker loaded only after consent should not be flagged.
Short example placeholder should not be treated as a concrete secret.
